allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) items = data.get\('items', []\) for item in items: desc = item.get\('description', ''\) tid = item.get\('id', ''\) print\(f'{tid} | {desc}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) items = data.get\('items', []\) for item in items: tid = item.get\('id', ''\) desc = item.get\('description', ''\) inputs = item.get\('inputs', []\) input_names = [i.get\('name',''\) for i in inputs] if inputs else [] print\(f'--- {tid}'\) print\(f' DESC: {desc}'\) print\(f' INPUTS: {input_names}'\) print\(\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import re, sys msg = sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\).lower\(\) pattern = r'\\b\(tweet\\s*card|card\\s*de\\s*tweet|tweet\\s*visual|visual\\s*de\\s*tweet|estilo\\s*tweet|estilo\\s*twitter\)\\b' match = re.search\(pattern, msg\) print\(f'Message: {msg}'\) print\(f'Match: {match.group\(\) if match else None}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys try: data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) rows = data.get\('result', data.get\('data', []\)\) if isinstance\(rows, list\): for r in rows[:30]: msg = r.get\('event_message', ''\) if '[connect-social]' in msg or 'PFM' in msg or 'Auth OK' in msg: print\(msg\) else: print\(json.dumps\(data\)[:500]\) except Exception as e: print\(f'Parse error: {e}'\) print\(sys.stdin.read\(\)[:500]\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys raw = sys.stdin.read\(\) try: data = json.loads\(raw\) rows = data.get\('result', []\) for r in rows: msg = r.get\('event_message', ''\) if 'connect-social' in msg.lower\(\) or 'pfm' in msg.lower\(\): print\(msg[:200]\) except: print\(raw[:500]\) ")
